jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.
freshAuditPolicy.completionAuditDetail: When the current checklist is completed, run a broad detailed audit like the 2026-05-30 manual review: backend/API, frontend/UI, permissions, production behavior, performance/data scale, tests, deployment, logs, navigation, accessibility, and real user journeys; update remediation-backlog.md before continuing.

lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws restarted active; /api/status healthy; guarded page probes returned 307; related API probes returned 401/200 without 500; recent service logs clean except known Next standalone startup warning

lastRun.target: P1 server-side guards for client-heavy pages from fresh-audit findings
lastRun.summary: Added server-side session/permission wrappers around monitoring, traffic, docker, preferences, api-docs, and image-bed pages, moving browser behavior into explicit client components so unauthorized users do not land on pages that only fail after client API calls.
validation: git status and recent history checked

npx vitest run src/app/docker/__tests__/page.test.tsx src/app/monitoring/__tests__/page.test.tsx src/app/preferences/__tests__/page.test.tsx src/app/api-docs/__tests__/page.test.tsx src/app/image-bed/__tests__/page.test.tsx passed 15/15
npm run lint passed with existing react-hooks/set-state-in-effect warnings in moved client components
production services vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service restarted and active
production probes for guarded pages returned 307 and related APIs returned 401/200 without 500
recent production logs checked; no new error entries, only known Next standalone startup warning
lastRun.deployment: Restarted vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service successfully; smoke test passed.
lastRun.nextTarget: Continue remaining fresh-audit P1 items, starting with global search/navigation completeness or preference fields that are saved but not consumed.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
